stemHtml: What is correct regarding an anabatic wind? It can be described as a wind that blows…

options.a: Upslope caused by adiabatic heating as the air rises in the valley.
options.b: Downslope due to the radiation of heat from the Earth’s surface.
options.c: Downslope due to cold air that slides down a valley.
options.d: Upslope due to warming of air in a valley.
